name: Christopher Knight Home Set of 2 30" Cedric Faux Leather Barstool Vintage Brown: Upholstered Low Back, Steel Legs
description:
Pull up a seat at your kitchen island or home bar and relax in stylish comfort. Our bar stool set is a stunning addition to any home with its curved seating and polished base. Featuring a smooth upholstered design with intricate stitching, these bar stools will instantly upgrade your decor with a touch of modern. Not only are they the perfect bar height but they also feature a stylish, enclosed base that provides an extra boost comfort while you wine and dine.

CONTEMPORARY DESIGN: Featuring refined legs and smooth textures, our barstool set offers the look, feel, and design of a truly contemporary piece. With a minimalistic yet refined structure and smooth curves, this set brings out a simplistic style that emphasizes comfort and functionality.

UPHOLSTERED: Our barstools are generously upholstered, giving any room a refined appearance. This provides a smooth, immaculate texture for this piece as well as comfortable seating.

ELECTROPLATED IRON LEGS: Constructed of iron, the frames of these stools are made to be incredibly durable, ensuring that this piece will hold up under heavy use. Refined with a polish black finish, these legs bring a modern touch to this piece, making it a glamorous yet chic addition to your home.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your furniture. Each stool is 19.00” W x 21.75” D x 39.50” H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of this charming bar stool set.

ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Some assembly is required for this set of bar stools. All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included. This comes as a set of two.
